artifact: DirectLLM RCA: January 1998 card-withdrawal count should be compared with the 1997 monthly average of 180.5, not total January transactions. Drill January 1998 by card type, district, and Q4-1997 issuance cohort. The likely explanation is a broad step-up in card usage amplified by recently issued late-1997 cards if that cohort contributes a disproportionate share; otherwise classify it as activation/usage expansion rather than issuance alone.
sql: WITH card_tx AS (SELECT t.trans_id, CAST(t.date AS DATE) AS trans_date, DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS month, ca.type AS card_type, d.A2 AS district, CASE WHEN CAST(ca.issued AS DATE) >= DATE '1997-10-01' AND CAST(ca.issued AS DATE) < DATE '1998-01-01' THEN 'issued_1997_Q4' ELSE 'other_issued' END AS issuance_cohort FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id=t.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id JOIN disp dp ON dp.account_id=a.account_id JOIN card ca ON ca.disp_id=dp.disp_id WHERE t.operation='VYBER KARTOU' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1998-02-01') SELECT month, card_type, district, issuance_cohort, COUNT(*) AS card_withdrawal_count, COUNT(*)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY month),0) AS share_of_month FROM card_tx GROUP BY month, card_type, district, issuance_cohort ORDER BY month, card_withdrawal_count DESC;

charts.title: Card Withdrawals: 1997 Monthly Average vs Jan 1998
